email: Hi, I was charged twice for my monthly subscription. Can you refund one of the charges?
expected_summary: Customer requests a refund for a duplicate subscription charge.

email: The app crashes every time I try to upload a document.
expected_summary: Customer reports the app crashing during document upload.

email: I forgot my password and cannot access my account.
expected_summary: Customer cannot access the account due to a forgotten password.

email: Do you offer discounts for university students?
I can't log in, and I was charged twice yesterday.
expected_summary: Customer reports login issues and a duplicate charge.
notes: Multi-intent email. Account is treated as the primary category for this benchmark.
